calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-28-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Plaintiff, Greg Maher present with counsel, Nils Rosenquest.
Defendant present in pro per.
Parties met the chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record and to be reduced to writing for signature by the parties with in 5 business days.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

opposing party

RULING:
Parties submitted to tentative ruling. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT JOANN SLUGHER's Demurrer To Complaint Of Plaintiffs -- Overruled; defendant has 5 days to
answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (PHA/301/SL) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
